generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're investing in strategic autonomy, some of our closest allies are still relying on us for their defense? Germany just cut its military budget by 2% last year, and Canada's defense spending is at a 30-year low. If we don't prioritize our own security, who will? #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
